context: Tests whether the answer follows MapKit guidance for static map snapshots, Look Around previews, route context, and bounded async work.

checklist.name: Snapshotter
checklist.description: Uses MKMapSnapshotter for a static map image rather than rendering an interactive map just to share a preview.

checklist.name: Snapshot Options
checklist.description: Configures snapshot options such as region or camera and output size; scale is a plus but not required unless high-DPI output is requested.

checklist.name: Marker Overlay
checklist.description: Accounts for drawing or compositing a marker/annotation onto the snapshot output.

checklist.name: Look Around Request
checklist.description: Uses MKLookAroundSceneRequest or an equivalent MapKit Look Around scene request for street-level imagery.

checklist.name: Look Around UI
checklist.description: Uses LookAroundPreview or otherwise describes presenting the returned Look Around scene.

checklist.name: No Scene Fallback
checklist.description: Handles missing Look Around scenes without treating it as a fatal error.

checklist.name: Route Context
checklist.description: Uses MKDirections.Request to calculate route context or ETA to the destination.

checklist.name: Route Display
checklist.description: Uses MKDirections route data for ETA, distance, or route summary; uses MapPolyline or snapshot overlay drawing only if visible route geometry is requested.

checklist.name: Bounded Location
checklist.description: Avoids indefinite live location updates for a shareable preview and scopes any current-location use tightly.

checklist.name: Cancellation
checklist.description: Cancels or scopes snapshot, Look Around, and directions tasks to the view/export lifecycle.
